reasoning: English query asking where to see traditional pottery being made in Kyushu. Tool calls get_local_specialty for Saga with category=craft and lang=en. Two issues: (1) Saga is only one of seven Kyushu prefectures — Kumamoto (Amakusa pottery), Nagasaki (Hasami ware), Fukuoka (Hakata), Oita (Koishiwara ware), Kagoshima (Satsuma ware) all missing. (2) The query asks to see pottery being made (kiln/workshop visit) but the response gives METI designation descriptions, not kiln venues. One of the three items is Hakata Ori (weave, not pottery) — included because category=craft was used. The routing_hint in the response itself recommends get_traditional_arts as a better tool. see_also_wikidata_venues shows museums in Saga, not kilns. Factual accuracy 4 (Hakata Ori is correctly described as weave, not misrepresented as pottery, but its presence in a pottery query is misleading). Constraint_handling 3: geographic scope (Kyushu vs Saga only) and lang=en correctly applied but geographic scope miss.
missing_data: Pottery data for other Kyushu prefectures: Koishiwara ware (Fukuoka), Hasami ware (Nagasaki), Amakusa pottery (Kumamoto), Satsuma ware (Kagoshima), Onta ware (Oita). Kiln visit venue data with address/hours.
wrong_data: Hakata Ori (weave) returned in a pottery-specific query — technically in craft category but misleading for pottery seekers.
improvement_hint: For Kyushu regional queries, apply region fan-out across all 7 prefectures (Fukuoka, Saga, Nagasaki, Kumamoto, Oita, Miyazaki, Kagoshima). Use get_traditional_arts with region=Kyushu or issue parallel prefecture calls filtered to 陶磁器 industry_category. Add kiln venue data (窯元) to craft entries for experiential tourism queries.

reasoning: Korean query asking about traditional festivals in Tohoku region. Tool calls get_festivals for Aomori with lang=ko — one prefecture of six in Tohoku (Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima). Major Tohoku festivals missing: Sendai Tanabata (Miyagi), Akita Kanto Festival, Yamagata Hanagasa Matsuri, Morioka Sansa Odori (Iwate), Soma Nomaoi (Fukushima). The national_heritage section lists UNESCO ICH entries from across Japan (Saitama, Toyama, Mie, Aichi, Gifu, Chiba, Tochigi, Oita) — not Tohoku-specific, degrading relevance. Korean translations present (lang=ko correctly applied). Constraint_handling 3: lang correct but geographic scope misses 5 of 6 Tohoku prefectures. Intent 2: only Aomori festivals addressed despite Tohoku-region query.
missing_data: Festival data for Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima. Major Tohoku festivals: Tanabata (Sendai), Kanto (Akita), Hanagasa (Yamagata), Sansa Odori (Morioka). Tohoku-scoped national_heritage filtering.

improvement_hint: Apply region fan-out for get_festivals when a regional name (Tohoku, Kansai, Kyushu, etc.) is detected in the query. Issue parallel calls for all 6 Tohoku prefectures and aggregate results. Filter national_heritage to Tohoku-region prefectures when a regional query is detected. The routing_hint should be expanded to handle region-name intent extraction.
